lang_select.message:
👋 Welcome to iGate-TR!
Please choose your language to continue:
main_menu.message:
🏠 Main Menu
Choose what you need:
about.message:
✨ *iGate-TR Service* offers you:

📺 More than *27,000* live channels, movies, series and shows
🌍 More than *70 countries* around the world
👶 More than *260 children's* channels and series
📰 More than *65 local and international news* channels from various countries
🕌 More than *130 Islamic* channels, series and shows
📖 More than *45 Quran and Athkar* channels
download.message:
📲 *Downloading the app* is the most important step to experience the service.
Please follow the steps carefully 🙏

*Step 1:* Choose the device you want to install iGate-TR on:
download.smart.question: ❓ Do you have at least one of these devices?
download.smart.neither.message:
💡 To enjoy iGate-TR on your TV, you need one of these devices:

🔌 *Android Stick* — A small device that connects to your TV's HDMI port
📦 *Android Box* — A box that connects to your TV and turns it into a smart TV

After purchasing one, you can enjoy the full service! 🎉
download.mobile.ios_soon:
🍎 *iOS*

We're working on iOS support soon! 🔜
Follow our Telegram channel for updates.
install.s1:
📥 *Step 1 of 4*

🔸 Download the *Downloader* app from the Google Play Store directly from TV

Tap the button below to download directly 👇
install.s2:
🔍 *Step 2 of 4*

🔸 Open the *Downloader* app
🔸 In the search field, enter this code:

`{code}`

🔸 Press the search icon 🔎
install.s3:
⬇️ *Step 3 of 4*

🔸 Download the app
🔸 After downloading, install it

💡 *Important Note:*
If installation fails, the system may ask you to enable *Install from Unknown Sources*
Go to Settings, enable it, then continue with installation ✅
install.s4:
🚀 *Step 4 of 4*

🔸 Open the app
🔸 Enter your username and password

❓ Do you have your username and password?
install.s4.yes: ✅ Yes, I have my login credentials
install.s4.no: ❌ No, I don't have login credentials
install.login: 🔐 Enter your login credentials now and let us know the result 👇
install.success:
🎉 *Congratulations!* 🎊

The service has been activated successfully! 🌟
We wish you an enjoyable experience with over *27,000 channels* around the world 📺🌍

Enjoy the service! 😊
install.try_code2:
🔄 *Don't worry, let's try the backup code!*

🔸 Go back to *Downloader*
🔸 Enter this code instead of the previous one:

`{code}`

🔸 Follow the exact same download and installation steps as before

When done, tap the button below 👇
install.login2.fail: ❌ It didn't work, I need help
install.need_help:
😔 *We're sorry about that!*

Please contact our support team and they'll assist you as soon as possible 🙏
install.no_creds:
💡 *No problem!*

You can get login credentials through:

🎁 A free 24-hour trial
💎 Or subscribe to one of our packages

Choose what suits you 👇
install.contact_steps: 📋 To get the detailed installation steps for your device, please contact our team and we'll send them to you right away 🙏
trial.message:
🎁 Of course you can try the service completely free with no commitment to subscribe if you're not satisfied..

But the most important step before starting the trial is *downloading the app* on your device 📲
trial.success:
✅ *Your request was sent successfully!*

We've forwarded your request to our team and someone will contact you soon to activate the service for *24 hours* 🎉

Meanwhile, make sure the app is downloaded on your device:
trial.error: ❌ An error occurred while sending your request. Please try again later.
packages.message:
💎 Wherever you are in the world..

Here are the available offers, tap the one you're interested in 👇
packages.success:
✅ *Your request was sent successfully!*

We've forwarded your request to our team and they will contact you as soon as possible 🙏

Meanwhile, follow the app download steps:
packages.error: ❌ An error occurred while sending your request. Please try again later.
contact.ask_subject:
✉️ *Contact Us*

We'd love to hear from you! 😊
What is the *subject* of your message?
contact.ask_message: 📝 Great! Now write your *full message* in one message:
contact.ask_more:
👍 Message saved.

Would you like to add anything else? You can write it now, or press the button below when you're done:
contact.success:
✅ *Your message was sent successfully!*

Thank you for reaching out 🙏 One of our team will get back to you soon.
contact.error: ❌ An error occurred while sending your message. Please try again later.
fallback.message:
🤖 I'm an automated bot for *iGate-TR* service.
I can't understand this message, but you can navigate through the main menu or contact our team directly 👇
